mapper.insert:
SELECT SS_USER_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ss_use ( user_id, email, password, user_name, user_birth, user_tel, profile_img, user_tag, user_sex, user_role, provider, provider_id, reg_dt, mod_dt ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{email}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{userBirth}, #{userTel}, #{profileImg}, #{userTag}, #{userSex}, #{userRole}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE ss_use SET email = #{email}, password = #{password}, user_name = #{userName}, user_tel = #{userTel}, mod_dt = SYSDATE WHERE user_id = #{userId}
